title: Radford's Artistic Bungalows, Design No. 5085 (floor plan)
creator: Radford Architectural Company
rightsholder_or_source: Internet Archive (Cornell University Library scan); published 1908, public domain by age
research_notes: Page n30 of scan; Design No. 5085. Single-floor plan plus separate rendering on the same page (book also offers foundation/attic/roof plans not shown). Clean black-line plan.
research_features: Textbook one-story Craftsman bungalow: single floor plan with two bedrooms, living/dining, kitchen, a breakfast NOOK, bath, closets, and a deep front porch. Room names and dimensions labeled (30'6"x40'6"). Perspective rendering above the plan.
feature_highlights: living/dining/kitchen run down one side, two bedrooms and bath down the other
breakfast nook and pantry off the kitchen
stacked closets along a central spine
deep open front porch plus small rear service porch
entry vestibule with a 'DOWN' stair to a basement
supported_examples: room naming and labels for many rooms
interior and exterior door openings with swings
roadmap_examples: floor management / basement level implied by the 'DOWN' stair

gap_features.why: the deep front porch and rear service porch are roofed-but-open spaces, not enclosed rooms
